name: Joseon Survival
overview: Han Jung-Rok is a former national archer and current deliveryman from 2019. He ends up traveling to the past with his first love, Lee Hye-Jin and meets Im Kkeok-Jeong, a famous thief from the Joseon dynasty. Together, they struggle to survive, put their lives at stake for the people they love, and share a strong friendship.

trailers.title: 조선시대로 타임슬립한 강지환 vs 이재윤 초대형 전투 [조선생존기 1회] 20190608
